turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bright Smile Dental, this is Ava.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yeah, I need to reschedule my appointment.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay. What day would you like?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Whenever you have something next week.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We have some availability. I'll put you down.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Next week. You'll get a text.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, but which day and time?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: It should be fine. Is there anything else?
